user.title: Bastion Backup Gateway
user.description: Connect Home Assistant to your Bastion backup orchestration gateway.

data_description.url: Base URL of your Bastion server, e.g. http://192.168.1.50:8000 or https://bastion.example.com
data_description.token: Value of BASTION_INGRESS_TOKEN configured on the Bastion server

error.cannot_connect: Could not reach the Bastion server.
error.invalid_scheme: URL must start with http:// or https://.
error.ingress_disabled: Bastion is reachable but BASTION_INGRESS_TOKEN is not configured server-side.
error.timeout: Bastion did not respond in time.

abort.already_configured: This Bastion server is already configured.
